name: pbes
description: Plan Big, Execute Small: verified multi-agent orchestration for Codex with capability-aware model routing.

interface.shortDescription: Verified orchestration for broad agent work
interface.longDescription: Plan broad work, delegate bounded assignments, verify evidence, and synthesize results using Codex collaboration tools and capability-aware model routing.
defaultPrompt: Use PBES to investigate this project in parallel.
Use PBES to implement and verify this broad change.
